nasb.text: Geber the son of Uri, in the land of Gilead, the country of Sihon king of the Amorites and of Og king of Bashan; and he was the only deputy who was in the land.

esv.text: Geber the son of Uri, in the land of Gilead, the country of Sihon king of the Amorites and of Og king of Bashan. And there was one governor who was over the land.

cnv.text: 烏利的兒子基別在基列地，就是從前亞摩利王西宏和巴珊王噩之地。這地只有一個官員管理。

ccb.text: 乌利的儿子基别，独自负责从前属亚摩利王西宏和巴珊王噩的基列地区。
